ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Football: Carroll vs. Gonzaga) */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league in which the event is held */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the event takes place */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "field_conditions" TEXT /* Field conditions during the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., WCAC Lower Division) */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of the league (e.g., varsity, junior varsity) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the league president */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022 Fall Football Season) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team" TEXT /* Champion team of the season */,
  "runner_up_team" TEXT /* Runner-up team of the season */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Special awards or recognitions given during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue (e.g., Gonzaga College High School) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the venue (e.g., natural grass, artificial turf) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, spectator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
